verdict_reasoning: TMED10 is a multi-pass transmembrane protein that functions as an integral membrane component of the ER-ERGIC-cis-Golgi system. It is a canonical endomembrane coat protein with no documented surface trafficking, ectodomain shedding, secretion, or cell-state-induced surfacing. The protein is retained intracellularly via its four transmembrane domains and plays a role in anterograde cargo transport and COPI/COPII coat assembly—functions incompatible with PM accessibility.
